ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or name of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "price_per_sq_ft" TEXT /* Price per square foot of the product */,
  "price_per_case" TEXT /* Price per case of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "product_length" TEXT /* Length of the product */,
  "product_width" TEXT /* Width of the product */,
  "product_thickness" TEXT /* Thickness of the product */,
  "product_weight_per_sq_ft" TEXT /* Weight per square foot of the product */,
  "product_installation_type" TEXT /* Type of installation required for the product */,
  "product_warranty" TEXT /* Warranty information for the product */,
  "product_return_policy" TEXT /* Return policy for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Warehouse ID where the inventory is located */,
  "bin_location" TEXT /* Bin location within the warehouse */,
  "store_pick_stock" INTEGER /* Number of cases available for store pickup */,
  "ship_to_home_stock" INTEGER /* Number of cases available for ship-to-home orders */,
  "schedule_delivery_stock" INTEGER /* Number of cases available for scheduled delivery */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the product reaches the reorder level */,
  "last_counted" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last counted */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last inventory update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Order ID associated with the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "fulfillment_type" TEXT /* Type of fulfillment (e.g., Store Pickup, Ship to Home, Scheduled Delivery) */,
  "sale_price_per_sq_ft" TEXT /* Sale price per square foot of the product */,
  "sale_price_per_case" TEXT /* Sale price per case of the product */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount applied to the sale */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_fulfillment_type FOREIGN KEY ("fulfillment_type") REFERENCES fulfillment ("fulfillment_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fulfillment" (
  "fulfillment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of fulfillment */,
  "fulfillment_type" TEXT /* Type of fulfillment offered (e.g., Store Pickup, Ship to Home, Scheduled Delivery) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fulfillment option */,
  "additional_fee" TEXT /* Additional fee charged for this type of fulfillment */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the fulfillment option */,
  "cut_off_time" TEXT /* Cut-off time for the fulfillment option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fulfillment_id")
)
